basis: AGGREGATE model only. Blends NTTO Mexico country profile + large Bay Area Spanish-speaking population (Census ACS, language not ethnicity) + FIFA ticket-demand report. The 41% Spanish language share is an operational language signal, NOT a claim about any individual's nationality or ethnicity.
privacy_note: country_mix and language_mix are neighborhood-time aggregates above k_min. Never resolve to an individual. Never infer ethnicity.

basis: AGGREGATE model only. NTTO Brazil country profile + FIFA ticket-demand report. Portuguese share is a language/operational signal, not ethnicity or individual nationality.
privacy_note: Aggregate neighborhood-time only, above k_min. Never resolve to an individual.
